column1: # SUMPRODUCT(array1, [array2], …): element-wise product of equal-shaped ranges,
# summed. A NON-NUMERIC cell contributes 0 to its product position (so the whole
# term goes to 0; it does NOT error); mismatched shapes -> #VALUE!; an error
# cell propagates. A single array sums its numeric cells. Provenance: ECMA-376
